snippet.title: Shakira, Burna Boy - Dai Dai (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Shakira, Burna Boy - Dai Dai (Official Video)
FIFA World Cup Official Song 2026

Music: https://songwhip.com/shakira/dai-dai

Letra/Lyrics: 
Oe oe e oe Oe oe e oe
You knew from the day you were born
That here in this place you belong
You been this brave all along
What broke you once made you strong

Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go!
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go!

Come follow your desire
Theres a will there way
You are the owner of that fire
No one can take it away
Sweat and blood to write your story
That is how you paved the way
You are about to reach the glory
Only one step away

All the highs and lows
All the tears and the pain
You been there thru it all
Been thru it all
Just do it again
Now you got to believe (I believe)
Cuz you know what it takes
To be living the dream
At top of your game.

Feel it, got everything you needed
now bring it like you mean it
just like you mean it
Dale, no olvides lo que vales
Juega como tu sabes
Como tu sabes.

Energy is contagious you know
And it never fails no no
No one’s getting tired I know
Cuz you got that fire eio
Dream a little higher
Lets go lets go lets go
We’ve taken all that our hearts can hold
We can’t hold on to the past no more
From the dirt and the tears you make gold
You are more than flesh and bone

All the highs and lows
All the tears and the pain
You been there thru it all
Been thru it all
Just do it again
Now you got to believe ( I believe)
Cus you know what it takes
To be living the dream
At top of your game

Feel it, got everything you needed
Now bring it like you mean it
Just like you mean it
Dale no olvides lo que vales
juega como tu sabes
como tu sabes

snippet.title: Colorado Avalanche at Vegas Golden Knights
snippet.description: The Colorado Avalanche and Vegas Golden Knights clash in Game 3 of the Western Conference Final. Vegas leads 2-0 after a 3-1 win fueled by Ivan Barbashev. Vegas tries to build its streak while Colorado aims to bounce back as rivals drop the puck.

localized.title: Colorado Avalanche at Vegas Golden Knights
localized.description: The Colorado Avalanche and Vegas Golden Knights clash in Game 3 of the Western Conference Final. Vegas leads 2-0 after a 3-1 win fueled by Ivan Barbashev. Vegas tries to build its streak while Colorado aims to bounce back as rivals drop the puck.

snippet.title: Hoobastank - The Reason (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Hoobastank - The Reason (Lyrics): 

⭐Follow Dead Radio Club:
Instagram:  https://www.instagram.com/davcev/?hl=en
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0xF5l1EUXHQUG8jryaJrfN?si=bee0d3552a124b39
🔴 Picture : https://lexica.art/ 

⭐Hoobastank:
https://www.instagram.com/hoobastank/?hl=en

Lyrics:

I'm not a perfect person
There's many things I wish I didn't do
But I continue learning
I never meant to do those things to you
And so I have to say before I go
That I just want you to know
I've found a reason for me
To change who I used to be
A reason to start over new
And the reason is you
I'm sorry that I hurt you
It's somethin' I must live with every day
And all the pain I put you through
I wish that I could take it all away
And be the one who catches all your tears
That's why I need you to hear
I've found a reason for me
To change who I used to be
A reason to start over new
And the reason is you
And the reason is you
And the reason is you
And the reason is you
I'm not a perfect person
I never meant to do those things to you
And so I have to say before I go
That I just want you to know
I've found a reason for me
To change who I used to be
A reason to start over new
And the reason is you
I've found a reason to show
A side of me you didn't know
A reason for all that I do
And the reason is you

Contact: deadradioclubmusic@gmail.com
_________________________________________________
Hoobastank - The Reason
Released 28/10/2023
From the album "The Reason"

#Hoobastank
#alternative

snippet.title: Rocket League x Unreal Engine 6 - Official Reveal Announcement Trailer
snippet.description:
Don't miss the Unreal Engine 6 Reveal Announcement for Rocket League, the hit action vehicular football (soccer) game developed by Psyonix and Epic Games. Players can get the first look at the new era of Rocket League announced at the Paris Majors, with the reveal of a new version of Rocket League coming soon that's powered by Unreal Engine 6. Get the first look at Unreal Engine 6 in Rocket League, coming soon to consoles and PC.

#ign #gaming
tags: Rocket League x Unreal Engine 6 game trailer

localized.title: Rocket League x Unreal Engine 6 - Official Reveal Announcement Trailer
localized.description:
Don't miss the Unreal Engine 6 Reveal Announcement for Rocket League, the hit action vehicular football (soccer) game developed by Psyonix and Epic Games. Players can get the first look at the new era of Rocket League announced at the Paris Majors, with the reveal of a new version of Rocket League coming soon that's powered by Unreal Engine 6. Get the first look at Unreal Engine 6 in Rocket League, coming soon to consoles and PC.

#ign #gaming

snippet.title: The CJ Cup Byron Nelson, Final Round
snippet.description: The fourth and final round of the PGA Tour Byron Nelson concludes at TPC Craig Ranch. The surviving leaders battle through Championship Sunday to conquer the final 18 holes of stroke play and secure the tournament trophy in McKinney, Texas.

localized.title: The CJ Cup Byron Nelson, Final Round
localized.description: The fourth and final round of the PGA Tour Byron Nelson concludes at TPC Craig Ranch. The surviving leaders battle through Championship Sunday to conquer the final 18 holes of stroke play and secure the tournament trophy in McKinney, Texas.

snippet.title: Moy Bobadilla - Tus Mentiras (Letra)
snippet.description:
Moy Bobadilla - Tus Mentiras
Moy Bobadilla - Tus Mentiras (Letra)
Moy Bobadilla - Tus Mentiras (Letra/Lyrics)

✅ Follow Moy Bobadilla
https://youtu.be/Elp1SHhSQ9M?si=xdIcgUdiTAdP9Gjt

✅ Follow God Lyrics
https://x.com/god_lyrics_110?t=el3IoMlGSaRYKTsDzkYMGQ&s=09
https://open.spotify.com/playlist/26Ax7mFwsdp6lxuLZhBKDk?si=pWHCDUH6RPCLGmIQ5ys1AA
https://www.instagram.com/godlyricsmusic?igsh=MTg2NTZ6d3Vtb2poMg==

Letra

Y esta
Esta es para ti
Mentirosa
Su compa Moy Bobadilla
Y mi banda, La Certera, mi viejo
No sé por qué no fuiste sincera
Dejaste que yo más te quisiera
Y seguí entregándote todo el corazón
Para que en mí tuvieras, amor y comprensión
Cuando todo era más bonito
Vi por fin lo triste de mi suerte
Me sentí morir al ver que tú eras de él
Y que te necesito, te acabo de perder
Me hiciste sentir, por fin, amado
Y sabías que todo me tenías
No mediste el daño que me hacías
Mira lo que han hecho tus mentiras
Me has dejado el pecho destrozado
Este es para mí el día más triste
Pues nunca esperé lo que me hiciste
Creí que esta vez había encontrado
Ese amor por mí tan esperado
Pero también fui por ti burlado
¿Por qué?
¿Por qué tuvo que ser así, a tu modo?
Después de tanto amor, de tanto todo
¿Por qué me matas siempre que me miras?
¿Por qué llevaste al fondo así mi vida?
Si yo nunca te dañé, nunca
Como tú lo has hecho hoy con tus mentiras
Ahí te va Loui
Puro Music VIP
Me hiciste sentir, por fin, amado
Y sabías que todo me tenías
No mediste el daño que me hacías
Mira lo que han hecho tus mentiras
Me has dejado el pecho destrozado
Este es para mí el día más triste
Pues nunca esperé lo que me hiciste
Creí que esta vez había encontrado
Ese amor por mí tan esperado
Pero también fui por ti burlado

snippet.title: Texas Rangers at Los Angeles Angels
snippet.description: The Los Angeles Angels host the Texas Rangers in Game 3 of a three-game regular-season series. Left-handed pitcher Reid Detmers starts for Los Angeles, while slugger Jake Burger leads the Texas lineup in this AL West clash at Angel Stadium.

localized.title: Texas Rangers at Los Angeles Angels
localized.description: The Los Angeles Angels host the Texas Rangers in Game 3 of a three-game regular-season series. Left-handed pitcher Reid Detmers starts for Los Angeles, while slugger Jake Burger leads the Texas lineup in this AL West clash at Angel Stadium.

snippet.title: Pearl Harbor
snippet.description: Two pilots and lifelong friends (Ben Affleck, Josh Hartnett) fall for the same woman, but must put aside their differences when the Japanese attack their naval base on Dec. 7, 1941.

localized.title: Pearl Harbor
localized.description: Two pilots and lifelong friends (Ben Affleck, Josh Hartnett) fall for the same woman, but must put aside their differences when the Japanese attack their naval base on Dec. 7, 1941.

snippet.title: One Nation With Brian Kilmeade
snippet.description: In-depth analysis of the issues and stories that matter most to Americans while offering context and solutions to help bring the country together.

localized.title: One Nation With Brian Kilmeade
localized.description: In-depth analysis of the issues and stories that matter most to Americans while offering context and solutions to help bring the country together.

snippet.title: Chef's Kiss
snippet.description: Although the friends insist on no restaurants, the group finds a way to integrate a food concept into the hotel with the help of a local expert to curate a uniquely Southern experience. A new lounge space is revealed for guests, events and revenue.

localized.title: Chef's Kiss
localized.description: Although the friends insist on no restaurants, the group finds a way to integrate a food concept into the hotel with the help of a local expert to curate a uniquely Southern experience. A new lounge space is revealed for guests, events and revenue.

snippet.title: I Manifested You

snippet.title: Shift 7: Precision

snippet.title: ROBLOX DON'T WAKE GRANDMA..
snippet.description:
Today I had to be really quiet so I didn't wake up my grandma in Roblox! Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn
tags: foltyn and caylus playing roblox together
